title: Amtech F1120 13 Piece 6.25mm (1/4") Titanium coated high speed steel (HSS) drill bit set
features: DURABLE: These 6.25mm (1/4") shank high speed steel (HSS) drill bits are heat treated and have a titanium nitride coating performance
SIZES: The set includes assorted sizes between 1.5mm - 6.5mm
SIZE CAPACITY: 4 inch range ideal for household and trade applications
PRECISION PERFORMANCE: Provides smooth and accurate results
PLUMBING APPLICATIONS: Essential for household and trade pipework
description: From the manufacturer 13pc 1/4″ titanium coated HSS drill bit set 1/4″ hex shank titanium coated drill bits for longer life Sizes: 1.5, 2, 2.5, 3, 3.2, 3.5, 4, 4.5, 4.8, 5.0, 5.5, 6 and 6.5mm About us Amtech is a DK Tools brand and the company has been established for over 30 years. We started life as a family run market stall in London and now our know-how has been optimised across our vast range of tools for the home, garage and garden. We pride ourselves on assisting our customers with their do-it-yourself decision making process, because we are passionate about offering the right tools. Our business has been built over the years on the foundations of our 3 core company values, Honesty , Integrity and Trust .
